title: viscum articulatum var. liquidambaricola
intro: Viscum articulatum var. liquidambaricola, also known as Dodonaea viscosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly found in Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viscum articulatum var. liquidambaricola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
